name: TinyPNG – Compress WebP, PNG and JPEG images intelligently
snippet:
Free online image optimizer for faster websites! Reduce the file size of your WEBP, JPEG and PNG Images with TinyPNG's smart lossy compression engine.
Optimizing your images with the TinyPNG algorithm brings several benefits to your website. TinyPNG reduces file sizes by up to 80% without sacrificing quality, leading to faster page loads.

name: Speed up your website by compressing your pictures
snippet: Tinify's online photo compressor reduces the file sizes of AVIF, WEBP, JPEG, and PNG images, enhancing web performance while preserving quality.

name: How TinyPNG hit $660K revenue with a 6 person team in 2025.
snippet: Since its launch in 2013, TinyPNG has shown consistent revenue growth, reflecting its expanding user base and increasing adoption across various industries. TinyPNG hit $660K in revenue in July 2025. Explore the complete funding history and valuation milestones for this company.
